prompt: Use case: historical-scene. Asset type: 16:9 Remotion background plate. Image 1 is a style-only reference. Create the same layered hand-torn paper collage style with no people. A wide quiet mountain creek at the foot of layered blue-green peaks, with a low-saturation blue paper-water ribbon crossing the midground, bamboo on the left, an old pine and a tiny distant thatched shelter on the right. Provide a broad flat dry creek bank in the center-right for a separate elderly-woman-and-grinding-stone cutout and open space on the left-center for a separate scholar cutout. Add foreground bamboo leaves and rounded stones for parallax, while keeping the lower subtitle-safe area visually simple. Gentle warm daylight, patient and curious mood, visible paper fibers and matte edges. No characters, no human silhouettes, no grinding stone or iron pestle in the background, no text, no letters, no watermark, no logo, no modern objects, no magic, no photorealism, no 3D.
